_cite.reason: Span re-point (item 3): fact_span_not_in_source FACT whose span is verbatim in another pool source — re-point search_result_id/source_id/tier to the source that contains it. Deterministic, no LLM. Operator ruling 2026-07-04.

prior.claim_text: By 30 June 2027: Commission report on share of zero-emission HDVs in large fleet operators (Article 3c).
prior.source_span: By 30 June 2027, the Commission shall submit to the European Parliament and to the Council a report which contains an analysis of the potential need for and impact of initiatives to increase the share of zero-emission heavy-duty motor vehicles owned or leased by large fleet operators.
